structure_or_prototype_note: rocksalt TiN proxy; fixed-cell QE path verified in SC SuperLoop dossier E0-2026-06-25-0029
superconductivity_context: Loop-verified metallic nitride anchor; benchmark-adjacent conventional superconducting family.
condition_note: This reference context is film- and orientation-sensitive TiN; do not generalize the quoted Tc to arbitrary TiN morphologies or disorder regimes.
mechanism_note: Finite DOS at E_F in the loop-verified fixed-cell path is consistent with a conventional metallic nitride interpretation.
source_citation: Zhang et al., Applied Physics Letters 124, 182601 (2024), doi:10.1063/5.0207852

structure_or_prototype_note: AlB2-type (P6/mmm) fixed-cell QE path verified against literature lattice constants in dossier E0-2026-06-25-0095
superconductivity_context: Loop-verified fixed-cell metallic diboride candidate; not a Tc claim.
condition_note: Current free-cell and EOS follow-ups remain unresolved, so this stays below phonon promotion.
mechanism_note: Finite DOS at E_F survives the repaired NSCF/DOS path, but structural minimum remains unverified in the present setup.

structure_or_prototype_note: AlB2-type TiB2 proxy in dossier E0-2026-06-25-0103
superconductivity_context: Loop-verified exploratory diboride lane with completed fixed-cell QE chain.
condition_note: Current fixed-cell AlB2-type path yields near-zero DOS(E_F); this is a review-only outcome, not a phonon-ready hit.
mechanism_note: Useful negative-control style evidence for the present proxy family.

structure_or_prototype_note: AlB2-type ZrB2 proxy in dossier E0-2026-06-25-0177
superconductivity_context: Loop-verified exploratory diboride lane with bounded fixed-cell QE chain.
condition_note: Current fixed-cell DOS(E_F) is effectively zero; retained as a reviewed DFT-screened record rather than a metallic promotion.
mechanism_note: Evidence is useful for family-level calibration even though the present proxy outcome is not positive.

structure_or_prototype_note: AlB2-type MoB2 proxy in dossier E0-2026-06-25-0273
superconductivity_context: Loop-verified exploratory diboride lane with completed fixed-cell QE chain.
condition_note: Multiple MoB2 phases exist in literature; present record is limited to the reviewed loop proxy outcome.
mechanism_note: Current DOS(E_F) remains under review rather than a clean conventional-metal confirmation.

structure_or_prototype_note: AlB2-type WB2 proxy in dossier E0-2026-06-25-0091
superconductivity_context: Loop-verified exploratory diboride lane with completed fixed-cell QE chain.
condition_note: Current fixed-cell DOS(E_F) is near zero; retained as reviewed queue evidence, not as a phonon-ready hit.
mechanism_note: Useful reviewed endpoint for the same proxy family that contains other negative metallic outcomes.

structure_or_prototype_note: AlB2-type, P6/mmm; SC SuperLoop benchmark dossier uses a=3.086 A and c=3.524 A.
superconductivity_context: Bulk conventional superconductor benchmark at ambient pressure.
condition_note: Ambient-pressure bulk MgB2 benchmark reference.
mechanism_note: Canonical two-gap sigma/pi conventional EPC superconductor with strong E2g boron phonon coupling.

structure_or_prototype_note: Li-intercalated beta-ZrNCl layered nitride chloride.
superconductivity_context: Electron-doped layered nitride halide superconductor.
condition_note: Superconductivity requires lithium intercalation/electron doping; undoped beta-ZrNCl is not the superconducting state referenced here.
mechanism_note: Layered nitride-halide family with doping-sensitive superconductivity; mechanism remains outside a simple MgB2-style proxy.
source_citation: Yamanaka et al., Advanced Materials 8, 771-774 (1996), doi:10.1002/adma.19960080917

structure_or_prototype_note: Electron-doped layered hafnium nitride chloride derived from beta-HfNCl.
superconductivity_context: Intercalation-induced superconductivity in the beta-HfNCl family.
condition_note: Superconductivity requires electron doping via lithium intercalation; parent beta-HfNCl is not the superconducting state referenced here.
mechanism_note: High-Tc member of the doped MNCl layered nitride-halide family; strongly condition-sensitive.

structure_or_prototype_note: AV3Sb5 kagome metal with Cs spacer layer.
superconductivity_context: Ambient-pressure kagome superconductor with intertwined charge order and superconductivity.
condition_note: Ambient-pressure bulk single-crystal/single-phase literature context; no doping or high-pressure condition encoded in this baseline record.
mechanism_note: Kagome-system superconductivity intertwined with CDW/topological phenomenology; mechanism should not be collapsed into a conventional EPC label.
source_citation: Gupta et al., Nano Letters 23 (2023), doi:10.1021/acs.nanolett.2c04103

structure_or_prototype_note: PbO-type alpha-FeSe / beta-FeSe family baseline record.
superconductivity_context: Ambient-pressure iron-based superconductor baseline in the FeSe family.
condition_note: The baseline superconducting record is the PbO-type alpha-FeSe report with intentional selenium deficiency; do not generalize this number to arbitrary pressure, film, or intercalated FeSe variants.
mechanism_note: Minimal iron-chalcogenide superconducting family anchor; mechanism is not reduced here to a simple conventional EPC label.
source_citation: Hsu et al., Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences 105 (2008), doi:10.1073/pnas.0807325105

structure_or_prototype_note: 111-type tetragonal iron arsenide, P4/nmm.
superconductivity_context: Ambient-pressure stoichiometric iron-pnictide superconductor.
condition_note: Reported for the stoichiometric LiFeAs system; this record does not encode pressure or substitution tuning.
mechanism_note: Intrinsic 111 iron-based superconducting family anchor; mechanism remains in the iron-based unconventional space rather than a simple MgB2-style EPC picture.
source_citation: Wang et al., Solid State Communications 148, 538-540 (2008), doi:10.1016/j.ssc.2008.09.057

structure_or_prototype_note: Type-I barium silicon clathrate synthesized under high pressure/high temperature.
superconductivity_context: Clathrate superconductor baseline record for the light-framework branch.
condition_note: This baseline record refers to the high-pressure/high-temperature synthesized Ba8Si46 clathrate phase reported in the original discovery paper.
mechanism_note: Useful framework superconductor reference for non-layered covalent-network branches; no stronger mechanism claim is made here.
source_citation: Yamanaka et al., Inorganic Chemistry 39, 56-58 (2000), doi:10.1021/ic990778p

structure_or_prototype_note: Cu-intercalated Bi2Se3 topological-insulator host.
superconductivity_context: Topological-superconductor candidate family derived from Cu-intercalated Bi2Se3.
condition_note: Superconductivity is reported for copper-intercalated compositions around 0.12<=x<=0.15; undoped Bi2Se3 is not the superconducting state referenced here.
mechanism_note: Topological-doped superconducting family anchor with unconventional pairing interest; do not collapse to a conventional EPC label.
source_citation: Hor et al., Physical Review Letters 104, 057001 (2010), doi:10.1103/PhysRevLett.104.057001

structure_or_prototype_note: Ambient-pressure bulk lead baseline elemental superconductor.
superconductivity_context: Bulk elemental superconducting reference at ambient pressure.
condition_note: Ambient-pressure bulk elemental Pb reference; thin-film and alloy variants are not encoded in this baseline record.
mechanism_note: Strong-coupling conventional elemental superconductor with important spin-orbit physics, but this record does not upgrade beyond conservative reference language.
source_citation: Roberts, Journal of Physical and Chemical Reference Data 5, 581-822 (1976), doi:10.1063/1.555540

structure_or_prototype_note: Ambient-pressure bulk niobium baseline elemental superconductor.
superconductivity_context: Bulk elemental superconducting reference for the highest-Tc elemental-metal baseline.
condition_note: Ambient-pressure bulk elemental Nb reference; cavity-grade surface treatments and alloy variants are not encoded here.
mechanism_note: Canonical elemental type-II conventional superconductor used as a baseline control in many superconducting-device contexts.
source_citation: Roberts, Journal of Physical and Chemical Reference Data 5, 581-822 (1976), doi:10.1063/1.555540

structure_or_prototype_note: A15 / beta-tungsten-structure niobium-tin intermetallic.
superconductivity_context: Classic A15 intermetallic superconducting reference at ambient pressure.
condition_note: Baseline A15 Nb3Sn reference near stoichiometric composition; microstructure/composition tuning can shift the exact transition temperature.
mechanism_note: High-field conventional intermetallic superconductor and core A15 family anchor; retained here as a reference record rather than a novelty claim.
source_citation: Hardy and Hulm, Physical Review 95, 1435 (1954), doi:10.1103/PhysRev.95.1435

structure_or_prototype_note: K2NiF4-type lanthanum barium copper oxide cuprate.
superconductivity_context: Foundational hole-doped cuprate superconductor record.
condition_note: The reported superconducting state is Ba-doped La-Cu-O; the parent undoped La2CuO4 is not the superconducting state referenced here.
mechanism_note: Historic first high-Tc cuprate discovery; mechanism remains in the unconventional cuprate space and is not reduced here to a conventional EPC label.
source_citation: Bednorz and Muller, Zeitschrift fur Physik B 64, 189-193 (1986), doi:10.1007/BF01303701

structure_or_prototype_note: 123-type yttrium barium copper oxide cuprate.
superconductivity_context: Ambient-pressure high-Tc cuprate benchmark above liquid-nitrogen temperature.
condition_note: The literature discovery context is the oxygenated Y-Ba-Cu-O superconducting phase; oxygen deficiency strongly controls superconductivity and should not be flattened away.
mechanism_note: Canonical high-Tc cuprate family anchor with oxygen-ordering sensitivity and unconventional pairing physics.
source_citation: Wu et al., Physical Review Letters 58, 908-910 (1987), doi:10.1103/PhysRevLett.58.908

structure_or_prototype_note: 1111-type fluorine-doped LaOFeAs iron pnictide.
superconductivity_context: Foundational fluorine-doped iron-pnictide superconducting record.
condition_note: Superconductivity is reported for fluorine-doped compositions around x = 0.05-0.12; undoped LaOFeAs is not the superconducting state referenced here.
mechanism_note: Discovery-era iron-pnictide anchor; mechanism remains in the correlated iron-based family and is not relabeled as simple conventional EPC.
source_citation: Kamihara et al., Journal of the American Chemical Society 130, 3296-3297 (2008), doi:10.1021/ja800073m

structure_or_prototype_note: Layered perovskite ruthenate isostructural with La2-xBaxCuO4.
superconductivity_context: Ambient-pressure unconventional layered-oxide superconductor baseline.
condition_note: The discovery record refers to high-quality Sr2RuO4 crystals at ambient pressure; disorder strongly suppresses Tc and should remain explicit in later variants.
mechanism_note: Reference unconventional oxide superconductor outside the cuprate and iron-pnictide branches; pairing symmetry remains scientifically sensitive, so wording stays conservative.

structure_or_prototype_note: 122-type ThCr2Si2-structure hole-doped iron arsenide.
superconductivity_context: Foundational hole-doped 122 iron-pnictide superconducting record.
condition_note: The discovery report is for potassium-substituted compositions around x = 0.4; parent BaFe2As2 and end-member KFe2As2 are not the same superconducting context encoded here.
mechanism_note: Canonical 122 iron-based family anchor with doping-controlled superconductivity; wording stays in the correlated iron-pnictide lane rather than a simple conventional EPC label.
source_citation: Rotter et al., Physical Review Letters 101, 107006 (2008), doi:10.1103/PhysRevLett.101.107006

structure_or_prototype_note: 1111-type fluorine-doped samarium iron arsenide oxide.
superconductivity_context: Rare-earth 1111 iron-pnictide record above the LaO1-xFxFeAs baseline.
condition_note: Superconductivity is reported for fluorine-doped SmFeAsO1-xFx; the undoped parent is not the superconducting state referenced here.
mechanism_note: Early higher-Tc 1111 iron-based reference showing the rapid rare-earth optimization of the discovery-era pnictide family.

structure_or_prototype_note: Cubic Ir3Ge7-type intermetallic antimonide baseline record.
superconductivity_context: Low-Tc intermetallic superconducting reference with experimentally reported bulk transition.
condition_note: Ambient-pressure bulk Mo3Sb7 specific-heat literature context; this record does not generalize to pressure-tuned or Te-substituted variants.
mechanism_note: Conservative low-temperature intermetallic reference retained for family coverage; literature discusses electron-phonon coupling with possible additional magnetic complexity.
source_citation: Tran et al., Acta Materialia 56, 5694-5700 (2008), doi:10.1016/j.actamat.2008.07.048

structure_or_prototype_note: Rhombohedral calcium-intercalated graphite (MC6-type graphite intercalation compound).
superconductivity_context: Bulk graphite-intercalation superconductor with experimentally reported transition at ambient pressure.
condition_note: This record refers to bulk rhombohedral CaC6 synthesized as a calcium-intercalated graphite compound; do not flatten it into generic graphite or generic calcium-carbon mixtures.
mechanism_note: Reference layered intercalation superconductor retained for family coverage and conventional-EPC-adjacent benchmarking.
source_citation: Emery et al., Physical Review Letters 95, 087003 (2005), doi:10.1103/PhysRevLett.95.087003

structure_or_prototype_note: Potassium-doped C60 fulleride in the molecular-superconductor family.
superconductivity_context: Foundational alkali-fulleride superconducting record with experimentally reported transition in doped C60.
condition_note: The superconducting context is potassium-doped C60 in the K3C60 fulleride regime; the source distinguishes thin-film onset behavior from bulk Meissner evidence and should not be collapsed into undoped C60.
mechanism_note: Canonical molecular-superconductor family anchor; keep the wording in the fulleride lane rather than forcing a simplified elemental or intermetallic analogy.

structure_or_prototype_note: Mixed caesium-rubidium doped C60 fulleride in the early high-Tc molecular-superconductor literature.
superconductivity_context: Mixed-alkali fulleride reference with experimentally reported molecular-superconductor transition above the K3C60 baseline.
condition_note: The cited record is specifically for mixed Cs_xRb_yC60 prepared with dopant feed x = 2 and y = 1; this is not a claim about arbitrary Cs-only or Rb-only fulleride compositions.
mechanism_note: Useful higher-Tc fulleride anchor for the molecular-superconductor branch, with composition-sensitive density-of-states interpretation already noted in the discovery paper.

structure_or_prototype_note: Three-dimensional perovskite bismuthate in the canonical Ba-K-Bi-O high-Tc oxide family.
superconductivity_context: Copper-free oxide superconducting reference with experimentally reported transition near 30 K.
condition_note: This record is explicitly the single-phase Ba0.6K0.4BiO3 perovskite reported in the discovery paper; do not flatten it into generic BaBiO3, arbitrary K-doped bismuthates, or oxygen-unconstrained mixtures.
mechanism_note: Important bismuthate family anchor that should stay encoded as a doped oxide reference rather than be reduced to a generic conventional-metal analogy.

structure_or_prototype_note: Canonical cerium heavy-fermion intermetallic superconductor.
superconductivity_context: Foundational heavy-fermion superconducting record discovered in the late 1970s.
condition_note: This record refers to superconductivity in CeCu2Si2 itself and should remain in the heavy-fermion / strong-correlation lane rather than being collapsed into a simple low-Tc intermetallic baseline.
mechanism_note: Historic heavy-fermion mechanism anchor showing superconductivity emerging in a strongly correlated Kondo-lattice environment.
source_citation: Steglich et al., Physical Review Letters 43, 1892-1896 (1979), doi:10.1103/PhysRevLett.43.1892

structure_or_prototype_note: Actinide heavy-fermion superconductor in the unconventional UBe13 family.
superconductivity_context: Early unconventional heavy-fermion superconducting record with sub-kelvin bulk transition.
condition_note: This record is for bulk UBe13 in its heavy-fermion superconducting context; do not flatten it into generic uranium-beryllium alloys or treat it as a conventional EPC control.
mechanism_note: Mechanism-complex heavy-fermion anchor retained to keep the unconventional strong-correlation branch explicit in the credible corpus.
source_citation: Ott et al., Physical Review Letters 50, 1595-1598 (1983), doi:10.1103/PhysRevLett.50.1595

structure_or_prototype_note: Sr-doped infinite-layer nickelate candidate kept in the cuprate-like single-orbital lane.
superconductivity_context: Prescreen-stage mainline candidate retained because it preserves explicit hole-doping and infinite-layer charge-transfer semantics rather than generic metallicity alone.
condition_note: This is a DFT-screened exploratory record only; the superconducting relevance here depends on the explicit Sr-doped infinite-layer nickelate context and is not a bulk Tc claim.
mechanism_note: Primary mainline nickelate candidate for the 2D single-orbital charge-transfer route, with explicit parent-versus-doped semantics already encoded.

structure_or_prototype_note: Infinite-layer nickelate parent retained as a direct cuprate-like comparator.
superconductivity_context: Prescreen-stage parent nickelate comparator retained because it preserves the infinite-layer d9-adjacent lane and explicit charge-transfer framing.
condition_note: This is not a superconductivity claim for stoichiometric NdNiO2; it remains a DFT-screened parent comparator whose value is mainly in keeping the nickelate mainline explicit.
mechanism_note: Parent infinite-layer nickelate comparator for the main single-orbital route; should stay separated from the doped superconducting window.

structure_or_prototype_note: Pr-based infinite-layer nickelate comparator within the same mainline lane as NdNiO2.
superconductivity_context: Prescreen-stage rare-earth comparator retained to probe how the nickelate mainline shifts under rare-earth substitution while preserving infinite-layer semantics.
condition_note: This is a DFT-screened comparator only and should not be read as a verified superconducting claim for stoichiometric PrNiO2.
mechanism_note: Rare-earth control branch for the nickelate mainline; useful only if kept explicit as a comparator rather than merged into a generic nickel oxide row.

structure_or_prototype_note: Square-ligand layered nickel oxyfluoride candidate kept as a ligand-field branch of the mainline search.
superconductivity_context: Prescreen-stage square-ligand candidate retained because it preserves an explicit layered nickel oxyfluoride route rather than collapsing back into generic nickel oxide metallicity.
condition_note: This is a DFT-screened exploratory row only; the interest lies in the square-ligand geometry and charge-transfer framing, not in any claimed measured Tc.
mechanism_note: Useful mainline side branch for testing whether stronger ligand-field control can recover cuprate-like physics without using copper.

structure_or_prototype_note: 4d layered palladate comparator used as a wider-band stress test for the charge-transfer lane.
superconductivity_context: Prescreen-stage 4d comparator retained as a boundary test for the single-orbital charge-transfer lane, not as a promoted superconducting claim.
condition_note: This record is a DFT-screened 4d stress-test analog only; it is included to keep the wider-band failure boundary visible, not because superconductivity is established.
mechanism_note: 4d comparator that helps test where the mainline loses the desired charge-transfer confinement because the bands become too wide.

structure_or_prototype_note: 4d infinite-layer palladate comparator retained as a wider-band boundary test for the charge-transfer lane.
superconductivity_context: Prescreen-stage 4d infinite-layer comparator retained as a bounded charge-transfer boundary test, not as a confirmed superconductivity claim.
condition_note: This is a DFT-screened exploratory record only; it is kept visible because it tests whether the 4d route loses the desired confinement too early.
mechanism_note: 4d infinite-layer boundary comparator for the nickelate/cuprate mainline.

structure_or_prototype_note: Canonical STO-family oxide entry retained under explicit low-carrier-density superconducting semantics.
superconductivity_context: Prescreen-stage oxide-side-branch candidate kept for the dilute-carrier / ferroelectric-proximity route.
condition_note: This is a DFT-screened exploratory record only; superconducting relevance depends on dilute doping / vacancy context rather than stoichiometric bulk SrTiO3.
mechanism_note: Useful oxide side branch for low-density superconductivity benchmarking rather than a room-temperature mainline claim.

structure_or_prototype_note: Calcium titanate perovskite entry retained as an STO-adjacent oxide-side-branch comparator.
superconductivity_context: Prescreen-stage oxide-side-branch comparator retained to test structural compression in the STO-like family.
condition_note: This is a DFT-screened exploratory record only; no bulk superconductivity claim is implied.
mechanism_note: Oxide comparator for perovskite-side structure-pressure effects.

structure_or_prototype_note: KTaO3 perovskite retained as a dilute-carrier oxide-side-branch candidate with SOC relevance.
superconductivity_context: Prescreen-stage KTaO3-derived oxide candidate retained for the low-density superconductivity side branch.
condition_note: This is a DFT-screened exploratory record only; relevant superconducting interpretations depend on explicit low-density/interface conditions.
mechanism_note: SOC-relevant oxide-side benchmark within the dilute-carrier family.

structure_or_prototype_note: BaTiO3 perovskite retained as a ferroelectric-proximity oxide-side-branch comparator.
superconductivity_context: Prescreen-stage oxide comparator retained to test the ferroelectric-proximity side route.
